AXEBOTS_NORMAL.title: Rampaging Axebots
AXEBOTS_NORMAL.description: Malfunctioning construction bots repurposed for floor defense.
BATTLEWORN_DUMMY_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.title: The Training Dummy (Tutorial Ambush)
BATTLEWORN_DUMMY_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.descrip: A deceptively simple training encounter. The dungeon AI is watching.
BOWLBUGS_NORMAL.title: Bowlbug Nest
BOWLBUGS_NORMAL.description: A cluster of dungeon vermin spills from the walls.
BOWLBUGS_WEAK.title: Bowlbug Scouts
BOWLBUGS_WEAK.description: A small scouting party of dungeon vermin.
BYGONE_EFFIGY_ELITE.title: The Forgotten Effigy (Elite)
BYGONE_EFFIGY_ELITE.description: A statue from a previous season. It still remembers how to kill.
BYRDONIS_ELITE.title: Byrdonis the Watcher (Elite)
BYRDONIS_ELITE.description: A massive avian guardian with broadcast-enhancing feathers.
CEREMONIAL_BEAST_BOSS.title: The Ceremonial Beast (Floor Boss)
CEREMONIAL_BEAST_BOSS.description: The dungeon AI's prized creation. A ritual sacrifice gone horribly right.
CHOMPERS_NORMAL.title: Chomper Pack
CHOMPERS_NORMAL.description: Toothy dungeon scavengers hunting in a pack.
CONSTRUCT_MENAGERIE_NORMAL.title: Construct Menagerie
CONSTRUCT_MENAGERIE_NORMAL.description: A collection of mechanical dungeon guardians.
CORPSE_SLUGS_NORMAL.title: Corpse Slug Colony
CORPSE_SLUGS_NORMAL.description: Slugs feeding on the remains of previous crawlers.
CORPSE_SLUGS_WEAK.title: Corpse Slug Scouts
CORPSE_SLUGS_WEAK.description: Young slugs barely surviving on crawler scraps.
CUBEX_CONSTRUCT_NORMAL.title: Cubex Construct
CUBEX_CONSTRUCT_NORMAL.description: A geometric dungeon guardian that reshapes itself.
CULTISTS_NORMAL.title: Primus Cultists
CULTISTS_NORMAL.description: Dungeon zealots who worship the system. They gain power through prayer.
DECIMILLIPEDE_ELITE.title: The Decimillipede (Elite)
DECIMILLIPEDE_ELITE.description: A thousand-legged horror from the deep floors.
DENSE_VEGETATION_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.title: Overgrown Dungeon Corridor
DENSE_VEGETATION_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.descrip: The vegetation here has been mutated by dungeon energies.
DEVOTED_SCULPTOR_WEAK.title: Devoted Sculptor
DEVOTED_SCULPTOR_WEAK.description: An artist-class mob who shapes stone into weapons.
DOORMAKER_BOSS.title: The Doormaker (Floor Boss)
DOORMAKER_BOSS.description: The architect of passages between floors. Controls the exit.
ENTOMANCER_ELITE.title: The Entomancer (Elite)
ENTOMANCER_ELITE.description: A bug-controlling mob boss who commands swarms.
EXOSKELETONS_NORMAL.title: Exoskeleton Swarm
EXOSKELETONS_NORMAL.description: Hollow shells animated by dungeon energy.
EXOSKELETONS_WEAK.title: Exoskeleton Scouts
FABRICATOR_NORMAL.title: The Fabricator
FABRICATOR_NORMAL.description: A dungeon machine that builds smaller machines mid-fight.
FAKE_MERCHANT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.title: Fake Vendor (It's a Mimic!)
FAKE_MERCHANT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.descriptio: That vendor looked suspicious. It was a trap.
FLYCONID_NORMAL.title: Flyconid Swarm
FOGMOG_NORMAL.title: Fogmog
FOGMOG_NORMAL.description: A dungeon creature that hides in artificially generated fog.
FOSSIL_STALKER_NORMAL.title: Fossil Stalker
FOSSIL_STALKER_NORMAL.description: An ancient predator reanimated from the dungeon's fossil layer.
FROG_KNIGHT_NORMAL.title: Frog Knight
FROG_KNIGHT_NORMAL.description: An amphibian warrior with surprising combat skills.
FUZZY_WURM_CRAWLER_WEAK.title: Fuzzy Wurm
FUZZY_WURM_CRAWLER_WEAK.description: A deceptively cute dungeon worm. Bites harder than it looks.
GLOBE_HEAD_NORMAL.title: Globe Head
GLOBE_HEAD_NORMAL.description: A dungeon construct with a glass sphere for a head.
GREMLIN_MERC_NORMAL.title: Gremlin Mercenaries
GREMLIN_MERC_NORMAL.description: Hired dungeon thugs working for gold and crawler biscuits.
HAUNTED_SHIP_NORMAL.title: Haunted Ship
HAUNTED_SHIP_NORMAL.description: A ghostly vessel that drifts through the dungeon corridors.
HUNTER_KILLER_NORMAL.title: Hunter-Killer Unit
INFESTED_PRISMS_ELITE.title: Infested Prisms (Elite)
INFESTED_PRISMS_ELITE.description: Crystal constructs corrupted by parasitic dungeon organisms.
INKLETS_NORMAL.title: Inklet Swarm
INKLETS_NORMAL.description: Tiny shadow creatures that attack in overwhelming numbers.
KAISER_CRAB_BOSS.title: Kaiser Crab (Floor Boss)
KAISER_CRAB_BOSS.description: An enormous crustacean floor boss with impenetrable armor.
KNIGHTS_ELITE.title: Dungeon Knights (Elite)
KNIGHTS_ELITE.description: Armored warriors of the dungeon guard. Well-organized and lethal.
KNOWLEDGE_DEMON_BOSS.title: Knowledge Demon (Floor Boss)
KNOWLEDGE_DEMON_BOSS.description: A demon that feeds on information. Knows your deck before you play it.
LAGAVULIN_MATRIARCH_BOSS.title: Lagavulin Matriarch (Floor Boss)
LAGAVULIN_MATRIARCH_BOSS.description: The mother of all Lagavulins. Dormant until disturbed.
LIVING_FOG_NORMAL.title: Living Fog
LIVING_FOG_NORMAL.description: A sentient cloud of dungeon gas that corrodes everything.
LOUSE_PROGENITOR_NORMAL.title: Louse Progenitor
LOUSE_PROGENITOR_NORMAL.description: The original louse from which all others spawned.
MAWLER_NORMAL.title: Mawler
MAWLER_NORMAL.description: A massive-jawed creature that devours everything in its path.
MECHA_KNIGHT_ELITE.title: Mecha-Knight (Elite)
MECHA_KNIGHT_ELITE.description: A mechanized dungeon knight with upgraded weaponry.
MYSTERIOUS_KNIGHT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.title: The Mysterious Floor Knight
MYSTERIOUS_KNIGHT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.descri: A lone knight guarding a corridor. Their intentions are unclear.
MYTES_NORMAL.title: Myte Infestation
MYTES_NORMAL.description: Tiny parasitic creatures from the dungeon's organic waste.
NIBBITS_NORMAL.title: Nibbit Pack
NIBBITS_NORMAL.description: Small scavengers that nibble at your gear and HP.
NIBBITS_WEAK.title: Nibbit Scouts
NIBBITS_WEAK.description: A few lost nibbits looking for food.
OVERGROWTH_CRAWLERS.title: Overgrowth Crawlers
OVERGROWTH_CRAWLERS.description: Crawlers mutated by the dungeon's plant life.
OVICOPTER_NORMAL.title: Ovicopter
OVICOPTER_NORMAL.description: An egg-dropping flying construct. Watch out below.
OWL_MAGISTRATE_NORMAL.title: Owl Magistrate
OWL_MAGISTRATE_NORMAL.description: A judicial dungeon creature that passes sentence mid-combat.
PHANTASMAL_GARDENERS_ELITE.title: Phantasmal Gardeners (Elite)
PHANTASMAL_GARDENERS_ELITE.description: Ghost gardeners tending to the dungeon's deadly flora.
PHROG_PARASITE_ELITE.title: Phrog Parasite (Elite)
PHROG_PARASITE_ELITE.description: A parasitic amphibian that takes over host creatures.
PUNCH_CONSTRUCT_NORMAL.title: Punch Construct
PUNCH_CONSTRUCT_NORMAL.description: A dungeon machine designed exclusively for punching.
PUNCH_OFF_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.title: The Punch-Off Challenge
PUNCH_OFF_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.description: A dungeon-sponsored punching contest. The audience is watching.
QUEEN_BOSS.title: The Hive Queen (Floor Boss)
QUEEN_BOSS.description: Mother of the swarm. Her children will defend her to the death.
RUBY_RAIDERS_NORMAL.title: Ruby Raiders
SCROLLS_OF_BITING_NORMAL.title: Biting Scrolls
SCROLLS_OF_BITING_NORMAL.description: Animated scrolls that attack with paper cuts.
SCROLLS_OF_BITING_WEAK.title: Tattered Scrolls
SCROLLS_OF_BITING_WEAK.description: Weakened animated scrolls, barely holding together.
SEAPUNK_WEAK.title: Seapunk
SEAPUNK_WEAK.description: An aquatic dungeon creature with a bad attitude.
SEWER_CLAM_NORMAL.title: Sewer Clam
SEWER_CLAM_NORMAL.description: A giant clam lurking in the dungeon's waterways.
SHRINKER_BEETLE_WEAK.title: Shrinker Beetle
SHRINKER_BEETLE_WEAK.description: A beetle whose bite makes you feel very, very small.
SKULKING_COLONY_ELITE.title: Skulking Colony (Elite)
SKULKING_COLONY_ELITE.description: A hidden collective of dungeon organisms that attack as one.
SLIMED_BERSERKER_NORMAL.title: Slimed Berserker
SLIMED_BERSERKER_NORMAL.description: A crawler driven mad by dungeon slime infection.
SLIMES_NORMAL.title: Dungeon Slimes
SLIMES_NORMAL.description: Classic dungeon blobs. Split when hit hard enough.
SLIMES_WEAK.title: Small Slimes
SLIMES_WEAK.description: Junior dungeon blobs. Still slimy, less threatening.
SLITHERING_STRANGLER_NORMAL.title: Slithering Strangler
SLITHERING_STRANGLER_NORMAL.description: A serpentine creature that constricts its prey.
SLUDGE_SPINNER_WEAK.title: Sludge Spinner
SLUDGE_SPINNER_WEAK.description: A toxic spider spinning webs of dungeon sludge.
SLUMBERING_BEETLE_NORMAL.title: Slumbering Beetle
SLUMBERING_BEETLE_NORMAL.description: A dormant beetle. Do not wake it.
SNAPPING_JAXFRUIT_NORMAL.title: Snapping Jaxfruit
SNAPPING_JAXFRUIT_NORMAL.description: A carnivorous dungeon plant that bites back.
SOUL_FYSH_BOSS.title: Soul Fysh (Floor Boss)
SOUL_FYSH_BOSS.description: A massive spectral fish that devours souls.
SOUL_NEXUS_ELITE.title: Soul Nexus (Elite)
SOUL_NEXUS_ELITE.description: A convergence point for dungeon spirits. Extremely dangerous.
SPINY_TOAD_NORMAL.title: Spiny Toad
SPINY_TOAD_NORMAL.description: A toad covered in dungeon-hardened spines.
TERROR_EEL_ELITE.title: Terror Eel (Elite)
TERROR_EEL_ELITE.description: An electrified eel from the dungeon's flooded corridors.
TEST_SUBJECT_BOSS.title: Test Subject 47 (Floor Boss)
TEST_SUBJECT_BOSS.description: The dungeon AI's failed experiment. Now it's your problem.
THE_ARCHITECT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.title: The Architect's Arena
THE_ARCHITECT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.descriptio: The dungeon's chief designer challenges you personally.
THE_INSATIABLE_BOSS.title: The Insatiable (Floor Boss)
THE_INSATIABLE_BOSS.description: A creature with an endless hunger. It has eaten entire floors.
THE_KIN_BOSS.title: The Kin (Floor Boss)
THE_KIN_BOSS.description: A collective consciousness of merged dungeon creatures.
THE_LOST_AND_FORGOTTEN_NORMAL.title: The Lost and Forgotten
THE_LOST_AND_FORGOTTEN_NORMAL.descriptio: Previous crawlers who never made it out. Now they haunt the halls.
THE_OBSCURA_NORMAL.title: The Obscura
THE_OBSCURA_NORMAL.description: A shadowy dungeon creature that exists between dimensions.
THIEVING_HOPPER_WEAK.title: Thieving Hopper
THIEVING_HOPPER_WEAK.description: A small creature that steals your gold while you're not looking.
TOADPOLES_NORMAL.title: Toadpole Swarm
TOADPOLES_NORMAL.description: Juvenile amphibians swarming the dungeon corridors.
TOADPOLES_WEAK.title: Toadpole Scouts
TOADPOLES_WEAK.description: A few baby toadpoles exploring beyond their nest.
TUNNELER_NORMAL.title: Tunneler
TUNNELER_NORMAL.description: A burrowing creature that creates new dungeon passages.
TUNNELER_WEAK.title: Young Tunneler
TUNNELER_WEAK.description: A juvenile tunneler still learning to dig.
TURRET_OPERATOR_WEAK.title: Turret Operator
TURRET_OPERATOR_WEAK.description: A dungeon minion manning an automated turret.
TWO_TAILED_RATS_NORMAL.title: Two-Tailed Rats
TWO_TAILED_RATS_NORMAL.description: Mutated dungeon rats with an extra tail. Twice as mean.
VANTOM_BOSS.title: Vantom (Floor Boss)
VANTOM_BOSS.description: A vampiric phantom that drains life and sanity.
VINE_SHAMBLER_NORMAL.title: Vine Shambler
VINE_SHAMBLER_NORMAL.description: A plant creature shambling through the dungeon corridors.
WATERFALL_GIANT_BOSS.title: Waterfall Giant (Floor Boss)
WATERFALL_GIANT_BOSS.description: An enormous elemental that guards the aquatic floors.
